description: A care manager calls a high-risk patient to check on their status after a recent hospital discharge.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Open the patient's record in the care management platform.

expected_outcome.value: Care manager finds the correct patient.

nodes.task_description: Make the phone call to the patient.

expected_outcome.value: The care manager speaks with the patient to assess their condition.

nodes.task_description: Document the call in a new note, including that the patient has scheduled their follow-up appointment and has obtained their medications.

expected_outcome.value: The outreach attempt and its outcome are documented, closing the loop on the post-discharge follow-up.
